instagram.header: 🔗 Link in bio → Start your conquest
instagram.caption: Beware the depths of Thalassa. 🌊 The Bioluminescent Lurker isn't just an assassin; it's a silent guardian of the abyss. With the Abyssal Shadow ability, this 3-mana scout punishes those who dare strike your hero while it remains cloaked in stealth. Will you add this predator to your deck? 🦑✨
instagram.alt_text: An underwater bioluminescent creature with glowing tentacles lurking in the dark ocean depths of the Thalassa realm.

facebook.body: In the deepest trenches of Thalassa, where light is a luxury and silence is a weapon, the Bioluminescent Lurker waits. This unit is a testament to the brutal efficiency of the realm's evolution against the Void's corruption. At 3 mana with a 3/2 stat line, it excels as both an assassin and a scout. Its ability, Abyssal Shadow, ensures that as long as it remains in Stealth, your opponent pays a heavy price for aggression. Dealing 2 damage to any unit that attacks your hero creates a defensive perimeter that few are willing to test. How would you weave this lurker into your current strategy? Let us know in the comments.
facebook.link_cta: Master the tides and build your deck at our official site:

discord.content:
**Card Spotlight: Bioluminescent Lurker**

- **Realm:** Thalassa
- **Role:** Assassin / Scout
- **Stats:** 3 Mana | 3/2
- **Ability:** Abyssal Shadow — Stealth. While this unit is in Stealth, it gains +1 Attack and deals 2 damage to any unit that attacks your hero.

This unit is a master of defensive pressure. Don't let the glow fool you—it's the last thing your opponent will see before their board crumbles. 

[Join the battle at VOIDBORN](https://voidborn.fun)
